metadata.subject: math
notes: Static parent-skill seed for structural validation only.
Exact leaf scope, display naming and placement remain review items.

skills.title: Integer operations
skills.shortDescription: Apply integer arithmetic, sign rules and operation order needed by grade 7-9 mathematics.
safetyNotes: Draft parent skill; use only as reviewed structural metadata.

skills.title: Rational number operations
skills.shortDescription: Work with fractions, decimals and rational quantities used across algebra and geometry.
safetyNotes: Draft parent skill; use only as reviewed structural metadata.

skills.title: Percent and ratio
skills.shortDescription: Use percent, ratio and simple proportional quantities in grade 7-9 contexts.
safetyNotes: Draft parent skill; use only as reviewed structural metadata.

skills.title: Expression value
skills.shortDescription: Read algebraic notation, substitute values and evaluate simple expressions.
safetyNotes: Draft parent skill; use only as reviewed structural metadata.

skills.title: Expression transformations
skills.shortDescription: Use brackets, like terms and equivalent algebraic transformations.
safetyNotes: Draft parent skill; use only as reviewed structural metadata.

skills.title: One-variable linear equations
skills.shortDescription: Transform and work with one-variable linear equations in supported grade 7-9 forms.
safetyNotes: Draft parent skill; use only as reviewed structural metadata.

skills.title: Systems of two linear equations
skills.shortDescription: Represent and transform systems of two linear equations at a high level.
safetyNotes: Draft parent skill; use only as reviewed structural metadata.

skills.title: Powers and roots
skills.shortDescription: Use grade-appropriate exponent rules, roots and numeric forms.
safetyNotes: Draft parent skill; use only as reviewed structural metadata.

skills.title: Polynomials and factorization
skills.shortDescription: Work with polynomial structure, basic operations and factorization patterns.
safetyNotes: Draft parent skill; use only as reviewed structural metadata.

skills.title: Algebraic fractions
skills.shortDescription: Use rational algebraic expressions and transformations at the reviewed parent-skill level.
safetyNotes: Draft parent skill; use only as reviewed structural metadata.

skills.title: Basic quadratic equations
skills.shortDescription: Recognize and transform introductory quadratic equations and related forms.
safetyNotes: Draft parent skill; use only as reviewed structural metadata.

skills.title: Basic inequalities
skills.shortDescription: Use basic inequality transformations and interval reasoning.
safetyNotes: Draft parent skill; use only as reviewed structural metadata.

skills.title: Coordinate plane and graphs
skills.shortDescription: Read and plot points, tables and graphs on the coordinate plane.
safetyNotes: Draft parent skill; use only as reviewed structural metadata.

skills.title: Linear function
skills.shortDescription: Connect linear expressions, equations, tables and graphs.
safetyNotes: Draft parent skill; use only as reviewed structural metadata.

skills.title: Inverse proportion
skills.shortDescription: Work with inverse proportion as a table, formula and graph family.
safetyNotes: Draft parent skill; use only as reviewed structural metadata.

skills.title: Quadratic function
skills.shortDescription: Recognize introductory quadratic function structure, tables and graphs.
safetyNotes: Draft parent skill; use only as reviewed structural metadata.

skills.title: Basic geometric objects and angles
skills.shortDescription: Use points, lines, rays, segments, angle types and measurement relationships.
safetyNotes: Draft parent skill; use only as reviewed structural metadata.

skills.title: Triangle properties
skills.shortDescription: Use triangle angle relationships, sides and triangle inequality at a parent-skill level.
safetyNotes: Draft parent skill; use only as reviewed structural metadata.

skills.title: Triangle congruence
skills.shortDescription: Recognize reviewed triangle congruence criteria and proof scaffolds.
safetyNotes: Draft parent skill; use only as reviewed structural metadata.

skills.title: Parallel lines
skills.shortDescription: Use parallel lines, transversals and related angle relationships.
safetyNotes: Draft parent skill; use only as reviewed structural metadata.

skills.title: Quadrilaterals
skills.shortDescription: Use basic properties of parallelograms, rectangles, rhombi, squares and trapezoids.
safetyNotes: Draft parent skill; use only as reviewed structural metadata.

skills.title: Area and Pythagorean theorem
skills.shortDescription: Use area relationships and the Pythagorean theorem in reviewed calculation contexts.
safetyNotes: Draft parent skill; use only as reviewed structural metadata.

skills.title: Similarity and ratios
skills.shortDescription: Use similarity, proportional segments and scale relationships.
safetyNotes: Draft parent skill; use only as reviewed structural metadata.

skills.title: Circle relationships
skills.shortDescription: Use basic circle, arc, chord and angle relationships at a parent-skill level.
safetyNotes: Draft parent skill; use only as reviewed structural metadata.

skills.title: Vectors and coordinate geometry
skills.shortDescription: Use vector and coordinate ideas in introductory geometric contexts.
safetyNotes: Draft parent skill; use only as reviewed structural metadata.

skills.title: Right-triangle trigonometry
skills.shortDescription: Use introductory sine, cosine and tangent relationships in right triangles.
safetyNotes: Draft parent skill; use only as reviewed structural metadata.

skills.title: Basic probability and statistics
skills.shortDescription: Use simple descriptive statistics, probability and counting ideas for grade 7-9 work.
safetyNotes: Draft parent skill; use only as reviewed structural metadata.
